Converting the output of clip from {!r} to {!r} is deprecated. Pass `casting="unsafe"` explicitly to silence this warning, or correct the type of the variables.

)	Nz
One of max or min must be givenF
infTa
Passing `np.nan` to mean no clipping in np.clip has always been unreliable, and is now deprecated. In future, this will always return nan, like it already does when min or max are arrays that contain nan. To skip a bound, pass either None or an np.inf of an appropriate sign.r:
ValueErrorr7
